---
title: "Reducing Carbon Monoxide Emissions of Gas Turbines Analysis"
description: "A statistical consulting project to find interpretable features that contribute to reducing emissions from gas turbines"
author: "Jonas Reger"
date: "05/15/2021"
categories: [data analysis, github, r, statistics]
image: "thumbnail.jpg"
draft: false
freeze: true
---

**Overview**

In spring 2021, I contributed to a class group project for STAT 443 (Statistical Consulting) at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign. The objective of the project was to analyze [gas turbine data from the UCI repository](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/datasets/Gas+Turbine+CO+and+NOx+Emission+Data+Set) and find interpretable features towards reducing carbon monoxide emissions. The goal of the project was to communicate our results to a mock client as statistical consultants.

**Link**

[Documents on GitHub](https://github.com/wjonasreger/reducing_CO_emissions_analysis)
